expectations.text: Output accounts for the 800-1200 CNY nightly budget.
Output accounts for public transit convenience near the Bund.
Output compares or attempts to compare Ctrip/携程, Tongcheng/同程, and Fliggy/飞猪.
Output includes recommendations and platform/source caveats.
expectations.evidence: PASS: checked recommendations and source caveats

timing.note: Subagent notifications in this environment did not include total_tokens or duration_ms, so timing/tokens are unavailable.

workarounds: Automated text-based grading; human review recommended for factual hotel accuracy.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are text-coverage checks for workflow behavior, not factual verification of hotel inventory or live pricing.
